'''mapobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:focussing|focussing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-p-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:focussing|focussing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mapobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæpebeth|mæpebeth]] || [[word:mæpebej|mæpebej]] || [[word:mæpebesh|mæpebesh]] || [[word:mæpebe|mæpebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mapopoboth|mapopoboth]] || [[word:mapopoboj|mapopoboj]] || [[word:mapopobosh|mapopobosh]] || [[word:mapopobo|mapopobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mapoboth|mapoboth]] || [[word:mapoboj|mapoboj]] || [[word:mapobosh|mapobosh]] || [[word:mapobo|mapobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mapofboth|mapofboth]] || [[word:mapofboj|mapofboj]] || [[word:mapofbosh|mapofbosh]] || [[word:mapofbof|mapofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mapobotho|mapobotho]] || [[word:mapobojo|mapobojo]] || [[word:mapobosho|mapobosho]] || [[word:mapoboko|mapoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mapoboth|mapoboth]] || [[word:mapoboj|mapoboj]] || [[word:mapobosh|mapobosh]] || [[word:mapobo|mapobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mapobothol|mapobothol]] || [[word:mapobojol|mapobojol]] || [[word:mapoboshol|mapoboshol]] || [[word:mapobokol|mapobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mapobothotho|mapobothotho]] || [[word:mapobojojo|mapobojojo]] || [[word:mapoboshosho|mapoboshosho]] || [[word:mapoboko|mapoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mapobothon|mapobothon]] || [[word:mapobojon|mapobojon]] || [[word:mapoboshon|mapoboshon]] || [[word:mapobokon|mapobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mapobothoro|mapobothoro]] || [[word:mapobojoro|mapobojoro]] || [[word:mapoboshoro|mapoboshoro]] || [[word:mapobokoro|mapobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
